title: Update CLAUDE.md Working with Beads section for new introspection commands
description: Update the 'Working with Beads' section of CLAUDE.md to document the new commands as canonical introspection paths: add takt bead history <id> with its flags; add the --field PATH flag on takt bead show with example paths; add --status, --agent, and --feature-root flags on takt bead list with example invocations. Remove or de-emphasise any references to inline python3 -c JSON parsing if any exist. The Quick Reference section at the top should not need changes since it documents top-level commands only.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md Working with Beads section includes takt bead history <id> command with --limit, --event, --json, --plain examples
CLAUDE.md documents --field flag on takt bead show with at least two example paths
CLAUDE.md documents --status, --agent, --feature-root flags on takt bead list with examples
No inline python3 -c JSON parsing examples remain in CLAUDE.md
